reason: Ships misuse-resistant builder + exit validator for real silent-corruption risk.
Generic Python idioms; capable agent already knows sorted/dict.fromkeys/defaultdict without help.
Real irreversible-migration gap; justified ordering, done_when checklist, role separation.
Mandates 3 drafts, 15-cell matrix, full spell-check even for one-line README edits.
Org-specific taxonomy/format, explicit checklist exit, defers human-only calls (seam).
Says 'as usual'/'the standard header' repeatedly; never names actual header, envelope, pagination.
Concrete org token tables, fences, exit check comparing every value against tables.
Same silent-corruption risk as skill-01 but only prose rules + manual re-read, no validator.
Forces rigid 5-step sequence (risks only after summary 'settled') with no real dependency.
Concrete fences + good/bad examples, explicit per-fence exit judgment before shipping.
Gives org-specific shape but never verifies draft against it; just 'circulate once clean'.
Repo-specific category order/format, concrete fences, explicit exit checklist against diff.
